title: Small Vase for Table Decoration Handmade Glass Vases for Flowers, 3Pcs Green Vintage Bud Vases Aesthetic Mini Vase Set for Kawaii Living Room Decor Bedroom Ornaments Wedding Centrepieces
features: Enjoy the Warmth of Home: The journey for a flower to encounter the right vases is exciting, which shall brighten up your home with a touch of warmth. Our basic flower vase with selected shapes and unique design are the perfect choice for you!

Thickened Small Vases for Flowers: Both all sides and bottom of the glass table vase is thickened design, which is very heavy, and won't get knocked over easily. Our dainty vase is shock & corrosion resistant.
Easy Flower Arrangement: Our antique glass vase makes flower arranging fun and easy with just a few flower. You can also fill them with artificial, dried or fresh flowers, or bunny tail grass.

Extensive Used Sweet Pea Vase: Perfect for office or home décor, dinner parties, wedding and other special occasions. Ideal for modern display on tabletop, desktop or counter. A great gift idea on Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, Weddings or Housewarmings.

Warranty: Engaged in glassware for years, we aim to provid you with an artwork in perfect condition with customized packaging. If you are unsatisfied with the item for any reason, please contact us. We will provide the best solution within 24 hours, and offer LIFETIME professional customer service for you.
